understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to occupy all goal tiles marked '+' on the grid simultaneously by moving and placing selectable pieces onto them, progressing through all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Some adjacent objects can be pushed if they are pushable blocks. Walls act as obstacles that cannot be moved or pushed through, blocking movement. If multiple selectable pieces exist, the CLICK action changes control to another piece at a given position. Actions are limited by a step budget per level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to occupy all goal tiles marked '+' on the grid simultaneously by moving and placing selectable pieces onto them, progressing through all levels.
